CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION total_loans()
    RETURNS TRIGGER 
    AS $$ 
    BEGIN 
        UPDATE loan_summary 
        SET total_loan_count = (
            SELECT COUNT(*) 
            FROM loan 
            WHERE account_id = NEW.account_id 
              AND status = 'A'
        ) 
        WHERE account_id = NEW.account_id;
        RETURN NEW; 
    END; 
    $$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE TRIGGER tr_total_loans 
    AFTER UPDATE OF status ON loan 
    FOR EACH ROW 
    EXECUTE PROCEDURE total_loans()

WITH RECURSIVE user_edges AS (
    -- Two users are connected if they share a ref1 or ref2 value
    SELECT u1.id AS id1, u2.id AS id2
    FROM users u1
    JOIN users u2 ON u1.id < u2.id
        AND (u1.ref1 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref1 = u2.ref2 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref1 OR u1.ref2 = u2.ref2)
),
connected AS (
    -- Start: each user is its own component (represented by its own id)
    SELECT id AS node, id AS component FROM users
    UNION
    -- Propagate: if two users are connected, take the smaller component id
    SELECT e.id2 AS node, c.component
    FROM user_edges e
    JOIN connected c ON e.id1 = c.node
    UNION
    SELECT e.id1 AS node, c.component
    FROM user_edges e
    JOIN connected c ON e.id2 = c.node
),
min_component AS (
    SELECT node, MIN(component) AS component
    FROM connected
    GROUP BY node
),
user_with_component AS (
    SELECT u.*, mc.component
    FROM users u
    JOIN min_component mc ON u.id = mc.node
),
-- Assets that match a known user via ref1 or ref2
matched_assets AS (
    SELECT a.id AS asset_id, a.name AS asset_name, a.owner, uc.component
    FROM assets a
    JOIN user_with_component uc ON a.owner = uc.ref1 OR a.owner = uc.ref2
),
-- Grouped results for matched assets
grouped_matched AS (
    SELECT
        uc.component,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uc.id ORDER BY uc.id) AS ids,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uc.username ORDER BY uc.username) AS usernames,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uc.ref1 ORDER BY uc.ref1) AS refs1,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT uc.ref2 ORDER BY uc.ref2) AS refs2,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ma.asset_id) AS asset_count,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT ma.asset_id ORDER BY ma.asset_id) AS asset_ids
    FROM user_with_component uc
    JOIN matched_assets ma ON uc.component = ma.component
    GROUP BY uc.component
),
-- Assets with no matching user
unmatched_assets AS (
    SELECT a.id AS asset_id, a.name AS asset_name, a.owner
    FROM assets a
    LEFT JOIN users u ON a.owner = u.ref1 OR a.owner = u.ref2
    WHERE u.id IS NULL
),
grouped_unmatched AS (
    SELECT
        NULL::integer AS component,
        NULL::integer[] AS ids,
        NULL::text[] AS usernames,
        NULL::text[] AS refs1,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT ua.owner ORDER BY ua.owner) AS refs2,
        COUNT(DISTINCT ua.asset_id) AS asset_count,
        ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT ua.asset_id ORDER BY ua.asset_id) AS asset_ids
    FROM unmatched_assets ua
    GROUP BY ua.owner
)
SELECT ids, usernames, refs1, refs2, asset_count, asset_ids
FROM grouped_matched
UNION ALL
SELECT ids, usernames, refs1, refs2, asset_count, asset_ids
FROM grouped_unmatched
ORDER BY asset_ids

WITH prioritized AS (
  SELECT
    account.account_id,
    account.frequency,
    l.loan_id,
    l.date AS loan_date,
    account.date AS account_date,
    CASE
      WHEN l.date >= (NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours') THEN 0
      ELSE 1
    END AS priority
  FROM account
  LEFT JOIN loan l
    ON account.account_id = l.account_id
  WHERE account.district_id = 18
),
ranked AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY account_id
      ORDER BY priority ASC, loan_date DESC NULLS LAST
    ) AS rn
  FROM prioritized
)
SELECT
  account_id,
  frequency,
  loan_id,
  loan_date,
  priority
FROM ranked
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY
  priority ASC,
  CASE WHEN priority = 0 THEN loan_date END DESC NULLS LAST,
  CASE WHEN priority = 1 THEN account_date END DESC NULLS LAST

SELECT
    ref_cl.relname AS base_table,
    ref_att.attname AS base_col,
    src_cl.relname AS referencing_table,
    src_att.attname AS referencing_col,
    'CONSTRAINT ' || c.conname || ' ' || pg_get_constraintdef(c.oid) AS constraint_sql
FROM pg_constraint c
JOIN pg_class ref_cl ON ref_cl.oid = c.confrelid
JOIN pg_class src_cl ON src_cl.oid = c.conrelid
CROSS JOIN LATERAL UNNEST(c.conkey, c.confkey) WITH ORDINALITY AS u(src_attnum, ref_attnum, ord)
JOIN pg_attribute src_att ON src_att.attrelid = c.conrelid AND src_att.attnum = u.src_attnum
JOIN pg_attribute ref_att ON ref_att.attrelid = c.confrelid AND ref_att.attnum = u.ref_attnum
WHERE c.confrelid = (SELECT oid FROM pg_class WHERE relname = 'users')
  AND c.contype = 'f'
  AND c.confrelid != c.conrelid
ORDER BY src_cl.relname, u.ord

WITH distinct_purchases AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT user_id, purchase_date
    FROM purchase
),
with_month_num AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        purchase_date,
        (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM TO_DATE(purchase_date || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD')) * 12 
         + EXTRACT(MONTH FROM TO_DATE(purchase_date || '-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD'))) AS month_num
    FROM distinct_purchases
),
with_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        month_num,
        month_num - ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY user_id ORDER BY month_num) AS grp
    FROM with_month_num
),
streak_lengths AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        grp,
        COUNT(*) AS streak_length
    FROM with_groups
    GROUP BY user_id, grp
),
longest_streaks AS (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        MAX(streak_length) AS longest_streak
    FROM streak_lengths
    GROUP BY user_id
)
SELECT 
    longest_streak AS streak_length,
    COUNT(*) AS num_users
FROM longest_streaks
GROUP BY longest_streak
ORDER BY longest_streak DESC

WITH molecule_atoms AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atoms
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
),
molecule_bonds AS (
    SELECT 
        m.molecule_id,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bonds
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN bond b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
),
molecule_details AS (
    SELECT 
        ma.label,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(
            JSON_OBJECT(
                'molecule_id', ma.molecule_id,
                'atoms', JSON(ma.atoms),
                'bonds', JSON(COALESCE(mb.bonds, '[]'))
            )
        ) AS molecules
    FROM molecule_atoms ma
    LEFT JOIN molecule_bonds mb ON ma.molecule_id = mb.molecule_id
    GROUP BY ma.label
)
SELECT 
    JSON_GROUP_OBJECT(
        label,
        JSON(molecules)
    ) AS groupedMolecules
FROM molecule_details

WITH target_type AS (
    SELECT type FROM card WHERE disp_id = 41
),
cards_to_shift AS (
    SELECT card_id, disp_id
    FROM card
    WHERE type = (SELECT type FROM target_type)
      AND disp_id >= 1
      AND disp_id < 41
)
UPDATE card
SET disp_id = CASE
    WHEN disp_id = 41 THEN 1
    WHEN disp_id >= 1 AND disp_id < 41 AND type = (SELECT type FROM target_type) THEN disp_id + 1
    ELSE disp_id
END
WHERE type = (SELECT type FROM target_type)
  AND disp_id >= 1

WITH base AS (

        m.date,
        CASE WHEN m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_draw,

        SUM(CASE WHEN m.home_team_goal = m.away_team_goal THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
            OVER (ORDER BY m.id, m.date ROWS BETWEEN CURRENT ROW AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS grp
    FROM match AS m
),
draw_rows AS (
    SELECT 
        b.grp,
        MAX(CASE WHEN b.is_draw = 1 THEN b.id END) AS draw_id,
        MAX(CASE WHEN b.is_draw = 1 THEN b.date END) AS draw_date,
        SUM(CASE WHEN b.is_draw = 0 THEN b.total_goals ELSE 0 END) AS amount
    FROM base b
    WHERE b.grp > 0
    GROUP BY b.grp
)

    draw_id AS id,

    1 AS invoiced,
    amount
FROM draw_rows

WITH last_per_station AS (
  -- Last transaction at each gas station per customer
  SELECT *
  FROM (
    SELECT
      *,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY customerid, gasstationid 
        ORDER BY date DESC, time DESC, transactionid DESC
      ) AS rn
    FROM transactions_1k
  ) t
  WHERE rn = 1
),
classified AS (
  SELECT
    *,
    -- Check if this customer has any last-per-station transaction with amount < 10
    MIN(CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
      OVER (PARTITION BY customerid) AS has_no_issue,
    MAX(CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) 
      OVER (PARTITION BY customerid) AS has_issue,
    -- For amount < 10: rank by earliest date/time to find the first issue
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY customerid, (CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)
      ORDER BY 
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN date END ASC,
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN time END ASC,
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN transactionid END ASC,
        -- For amount >= 10: rank by latest date/time to find the last one
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN date END DESC,
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN time END DESC,
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN transactionid END DESC
    ) AS priority_rn
  FROM last_per_station
),
final AS (
  SELECT
    customerid,
    transactionid,
    gasstationid,
    amount,
    date,
    time,
    has_issue,
    -- For customers with issues: pick the first issue (amount < 10, earliest)
    -- For customers without issues: pick the last good transaction (amount >= 10, latest)
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY customerid
      ORDER BY
        -- Prioritize amount < 10 rows if any exist
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END,
        -- Among amount < 10: earliest first
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN date END ASC,
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN time END ASC,
        CASE WHEN amount < 10 THEN transactionid END ASC,
        -- Among amount >= 10: latest first
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN date END DESC,
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN time END DESC,
        CASE WHEN amount >= 10 THEN transactionid END DESC
    ) AS final_rn
  FROM last_per_station
)
SELECT
  customerid,
  transactionid,
  gasstationid,
  amount
FROM final
WHERE
  (has_issue = 1 AND amount < 10 AND final_rn = 1)
  OR (has_issue = 0 AND amount >= 10 AND final_rn = 1)

WITH qr1(item, subgroup) AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup1 FROM superhero_group WHERE subgroup1 IS NOT NULL
),
qr2(item, subgroup) AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup2 FROM superhero_group WHERE subgroup2 IS NOT NULL AND subgroup2 != 'nan'
),
-- Combine all items with their subgroup labels (prefixed to distinguish)
combined AS (
    SELECT item, 'sg1_' || subgroup AS subgroup_label FROM qr1
    UNION
    SELECT item, 'sg2_' || subgroup AS subgroup_label FROM qr2
),
-- Build edges between subgroup labels that share at least one item
edges AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a.subgroup_label AS sg_a, b.subgroup_label AS sg_b
    FROM combined a
    JOIN combined b ON a.item = b.item AND a.subgroup_label <= b.subgroup_label
),
-- Find connected components via recursive CTE
-- Start: each subgroup_label maps to the minimum connected label
nodes AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT subgroup_label FROM combined
),
-- Recursive closure to propagate minimum label through edges
closure AS (
    SELECT subgroup_label, subgroup_label AS component FROM nodes
    UNION
    SELECT e.sg_b, c.component
    FROM closure c
    JOIN edges e ON c.subgroup_label = e.sg_a AND c.component < e.sg_b
    UNION
    SELECT e.sg_a, c.component
    FROM closure c
    JOIN edges e ON c.subgroup_label = e.sg_b AND c.component < e.sg_a
),
-- For each subgroup_label, the component is the minimum reachable label
components AS (
    SELECT subgroup_label, MIN(component) AS component
    FROM closure
    GROUP BY subgroup_label
),
-- Assign dense_rank as group id based on component
group_map AS (
    SELECT subgroup_label, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY component) AS group_id
    FROM components
),
-- Join back to get items with their group
item_groups AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c.item, gm.group_id
    FROM combined c
    JOIN group_map gm ON c.subgroup_label = gm.subgroup_label
),
-- Also get subgroup1 and subgroup2 for display
full_data AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(qr1.item, qr2.item) AS item,
        qr1.subgroup AS subgroup1,
        qr2.subgroup AS subgroup2
    FROM qr1
    FULL OUTER JOIN qr2 ON qr1.item = qr2.item
)
SELECT
    fd.item,
    fd.subgroup1,
    fd.subgroup2,
    ig.group_id AS "group"
FROM full_data fd
JOIN item_groups ig ON fd.item = ig.item
ORDER BY ig.group_id, fd.item

        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        LAG(mission_end) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end) AS prev_end
    FROM superhero_missions
),
flagged AS (
    SELECT
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        CASE WHEN mission_start = prev_end THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS new_span_flag
    FROM ordered_missions
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT
        hero_id,
        mission_start,
        mission_end,
        SUM(new_span_flag) OVER (PARTITION BY hero_id ORDER BY mission_start, mission_end) AS span_group
    FROM flagged
)

    hero_id,
    MIN(mission_start) AS mission_start,
    MAX(mission_end) AS mission_end

WITH RECURSIVE item_craft_cost AS (
    -- Base case: items that only use resources (no sub-items)
    SELECT 
        s.item_id,
        s.item_price,
        s.resource_id,
        s.resource_price * s.quantity AS resource_cost,
        s.uses_item_id,
        0 AS sub_item_cost,
        s.quantity AS original_quantity,
        1 AS multiplier
    FROM store s
    WHERE s.resource_id IS NOT NULL AND s.resource_price IS NOT NULL
      AND (s.resource_price = s.resource_price) -- filters out NaN

    UNION ALL

    -- Items that use sub-items: resolve sub-items to their components
    SELECT 
        s.item_id,
        s.item_price,
        sub.resource_id,
        sub.resource_price * sub.quantity * s.quantity AS resource_cost,
        sub.uses_item_id,
        0 AS sub_item_cost,
        s.quantity AS original_quantity,
        s.quantity AS multiplier
    FROM store s
    JOIN store sub ON s.uses_item_id = sub.item_id
    WHERE s.uses_item_id IS NOT NULL 
      AND s.uses_item_price IS NOT NULL
      AND (s.uses_item_price = s.uses_item_price) -- filters out NaN
      AND sub.resource_id IS NOT NULL
      AND (sub.resource_price = sub.resource_price) -- filters out NaN
),
partial AS (
    SELECT 
        item_id,
        item_price AS retail_price,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN resource_price IS NOT NULL AND resource_price = resource_price 
                THEN resource_price * quantity 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) + SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN uses_item_price IS NOT NULL AND uses_item_price = uses_item_price 
                THEN uses_item_price * quantity 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) AS partial_craft_price
    FROM store
    GROUP BY item_id, item_price
),
full_cost AS (
    SELECT 
        item_id,
        SUM(resource_cost) AS full_craft_price
    FROM item_craft_cost
    GROUP BY item_id
)
SELECT 
    p.item_id,
    p.retail_price,
    p.partial_craft_price,
    COALESCE(f.full_craft_price, p.partial_craft_price) AS full_craft_price
FROM partial p
LEFT JOIN full_cost f ON p.item_id = f.item_id
ORDER BY p.item_id

SELECT 
    customerid,
    jsonb_object_agg(key, sorted_vals) AS aggregated_preference
FROM (
    SELECT 
        customerid,
        key,
        jsonb_agg(DISTINCT val ORDER BY val) AS sorted_vals
    FROM (
        -- Handle keys whose values are arrays: unnest the array elements
        SELECT 
            cp.customerid,
            kv.key,
            ae.val
        FROM card_preference cp,
             jsonb_each(cp.preference) AS kv(key, value),
             jsonb_array_elements_text(kv.value) AS ae(val)
        WHERE jsonb_typeof(kv.value) = 'array'

        UNION

        -- Handle keys whose values are objects: keep as JSONB text representation
        SELECT 
            cp.customerid,
            kv.key,
            kv.value::text AS val
        FROM card_preference cp,
             jsonb_each(cp.preference) AS kv(key, value)
        WHERE jsonb_typeof(kv.value) = 'object'

        UNION

        -- Handle keys whose values are scalars (string, number, etc.)
        SELECT 
            cp.customerid,
            kv.key,
            kv.value #>> '{}' AS val
        FROM card_preference cp,
             jsonb_each(cp.preference) AS kv(key, value)
        WHERE jsonb_typeof(kv.value) NOT IN ('array', 'object')
    ) sub
    GROUP BY customerid, key
) agg
GROUP BY customerid

WITH RECURSIVE hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: start from each employee, go to their direct boss (level 1)
    SELECT 
        e.id AS employee_id,
        e.salary AS employee_salary,
        m.id AS boss_id,
        m.salary AS boss_salary,
        m.bossid AS next_boss_id,
        1 AS level
    FROM staff e
    INNER JOIN staff m ON e.bossid = m.id

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: go up one more level in the hierarchy
    SELECT 
        h.employee_id,
        h.employee_salary,
        m.id AS boss_id,
        m.salary AS boss_salary,
        m.bossid AS next_boss_id,
        h.level + 1 AS level
    FROM hierarchy h
    INNER JOIN staff m ON h.next_boss_id = m.id
),
indirect_managers AS (
    -- Filter for indirect managers (level >= 2) with salary >= 2x employee salary
    SELECT 
        employee_id,
        employee_salary,
        level AS hierarchical_level,
        boss_id,
        boss_salary,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY employee_id ORDER BY level ASC) AS rn
    FROM hierarchy
    WHERE level >= 2
      AND boss_salary >= 2 * employee_salary
)
SELECT 
    employee_id AS employeeId,
    employee_salary AS employeeSalary,
    hierarchical_level,
    boss_id AS bossId,
    boss_salary AS bossSalary
FROM indirect_managers
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY employee_id

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (
    SELECT 
        id, 
        amount, 
        amount AS cum_sum, 
        1 AS bucket
    FROM transfer
    WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM transfer)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        t.id, 
        t.amount,
        CASE 
            WHEN cte.cum_sum + t.amount > 20 THEN t.amount 
            ELSE cte.cum_sum + t.amount 
        END AS cum_sum,
        CASE 
            WHEN cte.cum_sum + t.amount > 20 THEN cte.bucket + 1 
            ELSE cte.bucket 
        END AS bucket
    FROM cte
    JOIN transfer t ON t.id = (
        SELECT MIN(t2.id) FROM transfer t2 WHERE t2.id > cte.id
    )
)
SELECT 
    id, 
    amount, 
    cum_sum, 
    bucket
FROM cte
ORDER BY id

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION update_team_attributes_eff_to() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    UPDATE team_attributes ta
    SET eff_to = subquery.next_date
    FROM (
        SELECT
            id,
            COALESCE(
                LEAD(TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE, 1)
                OVER (
                    PARTITION BY team_api_id
                    ORDER BY TO_TIMESTAMP(date, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')::DATE ASC
                ) - 1,
                TO_DATE('5999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
            ) AS next_date
        FROM team_attributes
    ) AS subquery
    WHERE ta.id = subquery.id;
    RETURN NULL;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

CREATE OR REPLACE TRIGGER after_insert_team_attributes
AFTER INSERT ON team_attributes
FOR EACH ROW
EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_team_attributes_eff_to()

WITH RECURSIVE
max_depth AS (
    SELECT MAX(LENGTH(id)) AS md FROM superhero2
),
levels AS (
    SELECT (SELECT md FROM max_depth) AS lvl
    UNION ALL
    SELECT lvl - 1 FROM levels WHERE lvl > 1
),
computed AS (
    SELECT s.id, s.parent_id, s.color
    FROM superhero2 s
    WHERE s.color IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT p.id, p.parent_id,
        COALESCE(
            CASE 
                WHEN c1.color IS NOT NULL AND c2.color IS NOT NULL THEN
                    CASE WHEN c1.color = c2.color THEN c1.color ELSE 'gray' END
                WHEN c1.color IS NOT NULL THEN c1.color
                WHEN c2.color IS NOT NULL THEN c2.color
            END
        ) AS color
    FROM superhero2 p
    JOIN computed c1 ON c1.parent_id = p.id
    LEFT JOIN computed c2 ON c2.parent_id = p.id AND c2.id <> c1.id
    WHERE p.color IS NULL
)

SET color = c.color
FROM computed c
WHERE superhero2.id = c.id

INSERT INTO hero_attribute_bifurcation (hero_id, attribute_id, attribute_chunk, is_bifurcated)
SELECT 
    ha.hero_id,
    ha.attribute_id,
    CASE 
        WHEN ha.attribute_value <= 50 THEN ha.attribute_value
        WHEN gs.chunk_num <= ha.attribute_value / 50 THEN 50
        ELSE ha.attribute_value % 50
    END AS attribute_chunk,
    CASE 
        WHEN ha.attribute_value > 50 THEN 1
        ELSE 0
    END AS is_bifurcated
FROM hero_attribute ha
CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
    1, 
    CASE 
        WHEN ha.attribute_value <= 50 THEN 1
        WHEN ha.attribute_value % 50 = 0 THEN (ha.attribute_value / 50)::integer
        ELSE (ha.attribute_value / 50 + 1)::integer
    END
) AS gs(chunk_num)

        superhero_id,
        activity_code,
        LAG(ts) OVER (PARTITION BY superhero_id ORDER BY ts) AS prev_ts,
        LAG(activity_code) OVER (PARTITION BY superhero_id ORDER BY ts) AS prev_activity_code
    FROM superhero_activities
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT 
        ts,
        superhero_id,
        activity_code,
        SUM(
            CASE 
                WHEN prev_ts IS NULL 
                     OR activity_code != prev_activity_code 
                     OR ts - prev_ts > INTERVAL '5 minutes'
                THEN 1 
                ELSE 0 
            END
        ) OVER (PARTITION BY superhero_id ORDER BY ts) AS grp
    FROM ordered_activities
)
SELECT 
    superhero_id,
    activity_code,
    MIN(ts) AS interval_start,
    MAX(ts) + INTERVAL '5 minutes' AS interval_end,
    COUNT(*) * INTERVAL '5 minutes' AS total_duration
FROM grouped
GROUP BY superhero_id, activity_code, grp
ORDER BY superhero_id, interval_start

CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION words_get_chat(in_gid integer, in_social integer, in_sid text)
RETURNS TABLE (out_mine integer, out_msg text) AS $func$
SELECT
    CASE WHEN c.uid = s.uid THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    c.msg
FROM words_chat c
JOIN words_games g USING (gid)
JOIN words_social s ON s.uid IN (g.player1, g.player2)
JOIN words_users u_sender ON u_sender.uid = c.uid
JOIN words_users u_viewer ON u_viewer.uid = s.uid
WHERE c.gid = in_gid
  AND s.social = in_social
  AND s.sid = in_sid
  AND (
      u_viewer.muted = true          -- if the viewer is muted, show all messages (so they don't notice)
      OR u_sender.muted = false       -- if the viewer is not muted, only show messages from non-muted users
      OR c.uid = s.uid                -- always show the viewer's own messages
  )
ORDER BY c.created ASC;
$func$ LANGUAGE sql

WITH daily_first AS (

    SELECT 
        card_id,
        DATE(date_value) AS dt,
        date_value AS first_time,

    FROM (
        SELECT 
            card_id,
            date_value,
            price,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY card_id, DATE(date_value) ORDER BY date_value ASC) AS rn
        FROM card_prices
    ) t
    WHERE rn = 1
),
last_within_15 AS (
    -- Get the last available price within 15 minutes of the first price
    SELECT 
        df.card_id,
        df.dt,
        df.first_price,
        cp.price AS last_price_in_window
    FROM daily_first df
    JOIN LATERAL (
        SELECT cp.price
        FROM card_prices cp
        WHERE cp.card_id = df.card_id
          AND cp.date_value >= df.first_time
          AND cp.date_value <= df.first_time + INTERVAL '15 minutes'
        ORDER BY cp.date_value DESC
        LIMIT 1
    ) cp ON TRUE
)
SELECT 
    card_id,
    AVG(last_price_in_window - first_price) AS avg_difference
FROM last_within_15
GROUP BY card_id
ORDER BY card_id

create or replace function setup_vector_store(table_name text) returns void language plpgsql as $outer$
begin
  execute 'drop function if exists match_strategies(int, jsonb)';

  execute format('create table %I (
    id bigint primary key generated always as identity,
    description text,
    metadata jsonb
  )', table_name);

  execute format('create function match_strategies (
    match_count int default null,
    filter jsonb default ''{}''::jsonb
  ) returns table (
    id bigint,
    description text,
    metadata jsonb,
    similarity float
  ) language plpgsql as $inner$
  begin
    return query
    select
      %I.id,
      %I.description,
      %I.metadata,
      1::float as similarity
    from
      %I
    where
      %I.metadata @> filter
    limit match_count;
  end;
  $inner$;', table_name, table_name, table_name, table_name, table_name);
end;
$outer$

WITH pivoted AS (

        MAX(CASE WHEN var.name = 'genre' THEN vv.name END) AS genre
    FROM datapoint_variablevalue dv
    JOIN variablevalue vv ON vv.id = dv.variablevalue_id
    JOIN variable var ON var.id = vv.variable_id
    GROUP BY dv.datapoint_id
),
all_product_types AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS product_type
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'ProductType'
),
all_languages AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS publishing_language
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'publishing_language'
),
all_genres AS (
    SELECT vv.name AS genre
    FROM variablevalue vv
    JOIN variable v ON v.id = vv.variable_id
    WHERE v.name = 'genre'
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT
        td.id AS time_id,
        td.years,
        sd.id AS spatial_id,
        sd.name AS sp_name,
        pt.product_type,
        al.publishing_language,
        ag.genre
    FROM time_dimension td
    CROSS JOIN spatial_dimension sd
    CROSS JOIN all_product_types pt
    CROSS JOIN all_languages al
    CROSS JOIN all_genres ag
)

    ac.product_type,
    ac.publishing_language,

FROM all_combinations ac
LEFT JOIN pivoted p
    ON p.product_type = ac.product_type
    AND p.publishing_language = ac.publishing_language
    AND p.genre = ac.genre
LEFT JOIN datapoints dp
    ON dp.id = p.datapoint_id
    AND dp.time_dimension_id = ac.time_id
    AND dp.spatial_dimension_id = ac.spatial_id
GROUP BY ac.years, ac.sp_name, ac.product_type, ac.publishing_language, ac.genre
ORDER BY ac.years DESC

WITH tokenized AS (

        array_length(string_to_array(event_description, '#'), 1) AS num_tokens

),
min_tokens AS (

),
token_positions AS (
    SELECT g.pos
    FROM min_tokens mt, generate_series(1, mt.min_len) AS g(pos)
),
check_tokens AS (
    SELECT
        tp.pos,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t.tokens[tp.pos]) AS distinct_count
    FROM token_positions tp
    CROSS JOIN tokenized t
    GROUP BY tp.pos
),
common_length AS (
    SELECT COALESCE(MIN(pos) - 1, (SELECT min_len FROM min_tokens)) AS prefix_len
    FROM check_tokens
    WHERE distinct_count > 1
),
first_row_tokens AS (
    SELECT tokens FROM tokenized LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN cl.prefix_len = 0 THEN ''
        ELSE array_to_string((SELECT tokens[1:cl.prefix_len] FROM first_row_tokens), '#')
    END AS common_prefix
FROM common_length cl

-- First, create the trigger function that enforces both conditions
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION check_match_results_constraints()
RETURNS TRIGGER AS $$
BEGIN
    -- Condition 1: If rows with the same match_id and team_id already exist,
    -- the score must match the existing score.
    IF EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM match_results
        WHERE match_id = NEW.match_id
          AND team_id = NEW.team_id
          AND score IS DISTINCT FROM NEW.score
    ) THEN
        RAISE EXCEPTION 'Score mismatch: rows with match_id=% and team_id=% must have the same score.',
            NEW.match_id, NEW.team_id;
    END IF;

    -- Condition 2: If the match_id and team_id combination is unique (no other rows
    -- share this combination), then the score must be unique across all other
    -- unique match_id/team_id combinations.
    IF NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM match_results
        WHERE match_id = NEW.match_id
          AND team_id = NEW.team_id
    ) THEN
        IF EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM match_results mr
            WHERE mr.score = NEW.score
              AND NOT (mr.match_id = NEW.match_id AND mr.team_id = NEW.team_id)
            GROUP BY mr.match_id, mr.team_id
            HAVING COUNT(*) = 1
        ) THEN
            RAISE EXCEPTION 'Score uniqueness violation: score=% already exists for another unique match_id/team_id combination.',
                NEW.score;
        END IF;
    END IF;

    RETURN NEW;
END;
$$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

-- Then, create the trigger on the match_results table
DROP TRIGGER IF EXISTS trg_check_match_results ON match_results;

CREATE TRIGGER trg_check_match_results
BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE ON match_results
FOR EACH ROW
EXECUTE FUNCTION check_match_results_constraints()

WITH date_series AS (
    SELECT 
        b.id,
        b.rate,
        b.time_span,
        d::date AS the_date,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM LOWER(b.time_span))::int AS start_dom
    FROM budgets b
    CROSS JOIN LATERAL generate_series(
        LOWER(b.time_span)::timestamp,
        (COALESCE(UPPER(b.time_span), NOW()))::timestamp - INTERVAL '1 day',
        INTERVAL '1 day'
    ) AS d
),
with_periods AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        rate,
        the_date,
        start_dom,
        -- Determine the start of the current monthly period
        CASE 
            WHEN EXTRACT(DAY FROM the_date) >= start_dom 
            THEN make_date(EXTRACT(YEAR FROM the_date)::int, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM the_date)::int, start_dom)
            ELSE make_date(
                EXTRACT(YEAR FROM (the_date - INTERVAL '1 month'))::int,
                EXTRACT(MONTH FROM (the_date - INTERVAL '1 month'))::int,
                start_dom
            )
        END AS period_start
    FROM date_series
),
with_period_end AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        rate,
        the_date,
        period_start,
        -- The end of the current monthly period is period_start + 1 month
        (period_start + INTERVAL '1 month')::date AS period_end
    FROM with_periods
),
with_days_in_period AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        rate,
        the_date,
        period_start,
        period_end,
        (period_end - period_start) AS days_in_period
    FROM with_period_end
)
SELECT
    the_date,
    ROUND(rate::numeric / days_in_period, 2) AS daily_rate
FROM with_days_in_period
ORDER BY id, the_date

-- 1) Add a "status" column to curricula if it doesn't exist
ALTER TABLE curricula 
  ADD COLUMN status TEXT DEFAULT 'installed';

-- 2) Correct recursive CTE that traverses curriculum -> resources -> other curricula
WITH RECURSIVE curricula_to_upgrade AS (
    -- Base case: pick the specific curriculum to upgrade
    SELECT c.curriculum_id
    FROM curricula c
    WHERE c.status = 'installed'
      AND c.curriculum_id = 1   -- e.g., "Introduction to Programming"

    UNION  -- UNION (not UNION ALL) to automatically eliminate duplicates and prevent cycles

    -- Recursive step: find other curricula that share resources with already-identified curricula
    SELECT cr2.curriculum_id
    FROM curricula_to_upgrade ctu
    -- Find resources belonging to the curricula we've already identified
    JOIN curriculum_resources cr1 
         ON cr1.curriculum_id = ctu.curriculum_id
    -- Find other curricula that also reference those same resources
    JOIN curriculum_resources cr2 
         ON cr2.resource_key = cr1.resource_key
    -- Only pick curricula that are currently 'installed'
    JOIN curricula c2 
         ON c2.curriculum_id = cr2.curriculum_id
         AND c2.status = 'installed'
)
UPDATE curricula
SET status = 'to upgrade'
WHERE curriculum_id IN (
    SELECT curriculum_id 
    FROM curricula_to_upgrade
)

WITH RECURSIVE date_series AS (
    -- Generate all dates from the start to end of each event
    SELECT 
        id,
        learner_code,
        resource_key,
        start_timestamp,
        end_timestamp,
        DATE(start_timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') AS day_date
    FROM event_usage
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 
        ds.id,
        ds.learner_code,
        ds.resource_key,
        ds.start_timestamp,
        ds.end_timestamp,
        ds.day_date + INTERVAL '1 day'
    FROM date_series ds
    WHERE ds.day_date + INTERVAL '1 day' <= DATE(ds.end_timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'UTC')
),
working_hours AS (
    SELECT
        id,
        learner_code,
        resource_key,
        start_timestamp,
        end_timestamp,
        day_date,
        -- Working window start and end for this day (in UTC, adjust if needed)
        GREATEST(
            start_timestamp,
            (day_date + TIME '09:00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
        ) AS effective_start,
        LEAST(
            end_timestamp,
            (day_date + TIME '18:00:00') AT TIME ZONE 'UTC'
        ) AS effective_end
    FROM date_series
    WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM day_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 5  -- Monday=1 to Friday=5
)
SELECT
    learner_code,
    resource_key,
    SUM(
        GREATEST(
            0,
            EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (effective_end - effective_start))
        )
    )::BIGINT AS total_working_seconds
FROM working_hours
WHERE effective_end > effective_start
GROUP BY learner_code, resource_key
ORDER BY learner_code, resource_key

WITH incidents AS (

        to_timestamp(incident_start / 1e9) AS incident_start,
        to_timestamp(incident_end / 1e9) AS incident_end

),
date_series AS (
    SELECT dd::date AS day_start
    FROM generate_series(
        (SELECT MIN(to_timestamp(incident_start / 1e9))::date FROM race_incidents),
        (SELECT MAX(to_timestamp(incident_end / 1e9))::date FROM race_incidents),
        '1 day'::interval
    ) dd
)
SELECT
    ds.day_start,
    COALESCE(SUM(
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (
            LEAST(T.incident_end, (ds.day_start + INTERVAL '1 day')::timestamp)
            - GREATEST(T.incident_start, ds.day_start::timestamp)
        )) / 60.0
    ), 0)::numeric AS incident_minutes
FROM date_series ds
LEFT JOIN incidents T
    ON T.incident_start < (ds.day_start + INTERVAL '1 day')::timestamp
   AND T.incident_end >= ds.day_start::timestamp
GROUP BY ds.day_start
ORDER BY ds.day_start

SELECT
  admin_week,
  COUNT(*) AS record_count
FROM (
  SELECT
    date,
    CASE
      WHEN (date - DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date) < 
           (7 - EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))::int) % 7 + 
           CASE WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) = 0 THEN 7 ELSE 0 END
        THEN 1
      ELSE
        2 + FLOOR(
          (
            (date - DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)::date)
            - (
                CASE 
                  WHEN EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)) = 0 THEN 0
                  ELSE 7 - EXTRACT(DOW FROM DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))::int
                END
              )
          ) / 7.0
        )::int
    END AS admin_week
  FROM laboratory
  WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    AND EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date) = EXTRACT(MONTH FROM CURRENT_DATE)
) sub
GROUP BY admin_week
ORDER BY admin_week

WITH buys AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS cum_before,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_after
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 0
),
buys_fixed AS (
    SELECT
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        COALESCE(cum_before, 0) AS cum_start,
        cum_after AS cum_end
    FROM buys
),
sells AS (
    SELECT 
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS cum_before,
        SUM(molecules) OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY date, transaction_id) AS cum_after
    FROM "transaction"
    WHERE sell = 1
),
sells_fixed AS (
    SELECT
        transaction_id,
        molecule_id,
        date,
        molecules,
        usd_total,
        COALESCE(cum_before, 0) AS cum_start,
        cum_after AS cum_end
    FROM sells
),
matched AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        b.date AS buy_date,
        s.date AS sell_date,
        -- The overlap between buy range [b.cum_start, b.cum_end] and sell range [s.cum_start, s.cum_end]
        MIN(b.cum_end, s.cum_end) - MAX(b.cum_start, s.cum_start) AS allocated_molecules,
        b.molecules AS buy_molecules,
        b.usd_total AS buy_total,
        s.molecules AS sell_molecules,
        s.usd_total AS sell_total
    FROM buys_fixed b
    JOIN sells_fixed s 
        ON b.molecule_id = s.molecule_id
        AND b.cum_start < s.cum_end
        AND s.cum_start < b.cum_end
)
SELECT
    molecule_id,
    buy_date,
    sell_date,
    allocated_molecules AS molecules,
    ROUND(buy_total * 1.0 * allocated_molecules / buy_molecules, 2) AS buy_usd_total,
    ROUND(sell_total * 1.0 * allocated_molecules / sell_molecules, 2) AS sell_usd_total
FROM matched
ORDER BY molecule_id, buy_date, sell_date

WITH RECURSIVE ordered AS (

        prediction_code,
        Performance_Prediction,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY prediction_code ASC) AS rn

A(GroupNum, n, RollingSum, rn) AS (
    SELECT 
        1, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        Performance_Prediction, 
        rn
    FROM ordered
    WHERE rn = 1

    UNION ALL

    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200 
            THEN A.GroupNum + 1 
            ELSE A.GroupNum 
        END,
        O.Performance_Prediction,
        CASE 
            WHEN A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction > 200
            THEN O.Performance_Prediction 
            ELSE A.RollingSum + O.Performance_Prediction 
        END,
        O.rn
    FROM A
    JOIN ordered AS O ON A.rn + 1 = O.rn
)
SELECT 
    GroupNum AS group_number, 
    SUM(n) AS cumulative_sum
FROM A
GROUP BY GroupNum
ORDER BY GroupNum

BEGIN;

-- Step 1: Merge source into target (update matched, insert new) and delete rows in target not in source
MERGE INTO treatment_and_followup_latest t
USING treatment_and_followup s
ON t.treatment_followup_id = s.treatment_followup_id
WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
    patient_id = s.patient_id,
    followup_no = s.followup_no,
    primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score = s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score,
    primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group = s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    primary_pathology_radiation_therapy = s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy,
    primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx = s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    has_follow_ups_information = s.has_follow_ups_information,
    has_drugs_information = s.has_drugs_information,
    has_radiations_information = s.has_radiations_information,
    project = s.project,
    day_of_form_completion = s.day_of_form_completion,
    month_of_form_completion = s.month_of_form_completion,
    year_of_form_completion = s.year_of_form_completion
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (
    treatment_followup_id, patient_id, followup_no,
    primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score, primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    primary_pathology_radiation_therapy, primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    has_follow_ups_information, has_drugs_information, has_radiations_information,
    project, day_of_form_completion, month_of_form_completion, year_of_form_completion
) VALUES (
    s.treatment_followup_id, s.patient_id, s.followup_no,
    s.primary_pathology_karnofsky_performance_score, s.primary_pathology_eastern_cancer_oncology_group,
    s.primary_pathology_radiation_therapy, s.primary_pathology_postoperative_rx_tx,
    s.has_follow_ups_information, s.has_drugs_information, s.has_radiations_information,
    s.project, s.day_of_form_completion, s.month_of_form_completion, s.year_of_form_completion
);

-- Step 2: Delete rows from target that no longer exist in source
DELETE FROM treatment_and_followup_latest t
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM treatment_and_followup s
    WHERE s.treatment_followup_id = t.treatment_followup_id
);

-- Step 3: Regenerate backup from the updated target
TRUNCATE treatment_and_followup_backup;

INSERT INTO treatment_and_followup_backup
SELECT * FROM treatment_and_followup_latest;

COMMIT

WITH src(id, geom) AS (
    VALUES 
        (1, 'LINESTRING(0 0, 0 10)'::geometry),
        (2, 'LINESTRING(0 10, 0 11)'::geometry),
        (3, 'LINESTRING(1 1, 0 5)'::geometry),
        (4, 'LINESTRING(1 1, 2 2)'::geometry)
)
SELECT a.id AS a_id, b.id AS b_id, ST_AsText(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom)) AS intersection_point
FROM src AS a
JOIN src AS b ON a.id != b.id
WHERE ST_Touches(a.geom, b.geom)
  AND NOT (
      ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_StartPoint(a.geom))
      OR ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_EndPoint(a.geom))
  )
  AND (
      ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_StartPoint(b.geom))
      OR ST_Equals(ST_Intersection(a.geom, b.geom), ST_EndPoint(b.geom))

WITH params AS (
    SELECT 
        TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 10:34:36' AS start_ts,
        TIMESTAMP '2023-01-10 15:12:24' AS end_ts
),
weekdays AS (
    SELECT COUNT(*) AS weekday_count
    FROM params,
    LATERAL generate_series(
        params.start_ts::date, 
        params.end_ts::date - interval '1 day', 
        interval '1 day'
    ) AS d(dt)
    WHERE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM d.dt) < 6
),
calc AS (
    SELECT 
        (weekday_count || ' days')::interval + (end_ts::time - start_ts::time) AS diff
    FROM params, weekdays
)
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM diff) || ' days ' ||
    EXTRACT(HOUR FROM diff) || ' hours ' ||
    EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM diff) || ' minutes ' ||
    EXTRACT(SECOND FROM diff) || ' seconds' AS time_diff
FROM calc

WITH tag_pairs AS (
    SELECT
        l.cluster AS left_id,
        l.cluster_type AS left_type,
        l.cluster_label AS left_label,
        r.cluster AS right_id,
        r.cluster_type AS right_type,
        r.cluster_label AS right_label,
        l.article
    FROM tag AS l
    JOIN tag AS r
        ON l.article = r.article
        AND l.cluster > r.cluster
),
links AS (
    SELECT
        greatest(link.source_cluster, link.target_cluster) AS big,
        least(link.source_cluster, link.target_cluster) AS smol,
        link.type AS type
    FROM link
)
SELECT
    tp.left_id,
    tp.left_type,
    tp.left_label,
    tp.right_id,
    tp.right_type,
    tp.right_label,
    count(DISTINCT tp.article) AS articles,
    array_agg(DISTINCT links.type) AS link_types
FROM tag_pairs tp
LEFT JOIN links
    ON tp.left_id = links.big
    AND tp.right_id = links.smol
GROUP BY
    tp.left_id, tp.left_type, tp.left_label,
    tp.right_id, tp.right_type, tp.right_label
ORDER BY count(DISTINCT tp.article) DESC

WITH ordered AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts::text
            ORDER BY start_date
        ) AS rn
    FROM sp_album
),
flagged AS (
    SELECT o.*,
        CASE
            WHEN prev.end_date IS NOT NULL 
                 AND o.start_date = prev.end_date + INTERVAL '1 day'
            THEN 0
            WHEN prev.end_date IS NULL 
                 AND prev.alb IS NOT NULL
            THEN 0
            ELSE 1
        END AS new_group_flag
    FROM ordered o
    LEFT JOIN ordered prev
        ON o.alb = prev.alb
       AND o.art = prev.art
       AND o.feat_arts::text = prev.feat_arts::text
       AND o.rn = prev.rn + 1
),
grouped AS (
    SELECT *,
        SUM(new_group_flag) OVER (
            PARTITION BY alb, art, feat_arts::text
            ORDER BY start_date
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS grp
    FROM flagged
)
SELECT
    alb,
    art,
    feat_arts,
    MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
    CASE 
        WHEN COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE end_date IS NULL) > 0 THEN NULL
        ELSE MAX(end_date)
    END AS end_date
FROM grouped
GROUP BY alb, art, feat_arts::text, feat_arts, grp
ORDER BY alb, art, start_date

) F ON CD.customer_id = F.customer_id

WITH RECURSIVE HierarchyCTE AS (
    SELECT entityid, parentid, CAST(emission AS DOUBLE) AS cumulative_total, pctcontribution
    FROM tree_table
    WHERE entityid NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT parentid FROM tree_table WHERE parentid IS NOT NULL)
    UNION ALL
    SELECT h.entityid, h.parentid, CAST(cte.cumulative_total * cte.pctcontribution / 100 AS DOUBLE), h.pctcontribution
    FROM tree_table h
    JOIN HierarchyCTE cte ON h.entityid = cte.parentid
)
SELECT t.entityid, t.parentid, t.emission + COALESCE(s.child_contribution, 0) AS cumulative_total
FROM tree_table t
LEFT JOIN (SELECT entityid, SUM(cumulative_total) AS child_contribution FROM HierarchyCTE WHERE cumulative_total NOT IN (SELECT emission FROM tree_table WHERE tree_table.entityid = HierarchyCTE.entityid) GROUP BY entityid) s ON t.entityid = s.entityid
ORDER BY t.entityid

WITH RECURSIVE calendar AS (

    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE(dt, '+1 day')
    FROM calendar
    WHERE dt < '2014-12-31'
),
workdays AS (
    SELECT dt
    FROM calendar
    WHERE strftime('%w', dt) NOT IN ('0', '6')  -- Exclude weekends (0=Sunday, 6=Saturday)
      AND NOT (CAST(strftime('%m', dt) AS INTEGER) = 1  AND CAST(strftime('%d', dt) AS INTEGER) = 1)   -- New Year's Day
      AND NOT (CAST(strftime('%m', dt) AS INTEGER) = 7  AND CAST(strftime('%d', dt) AS INTEGER) = 4)   -- Independence Day
      AND NOT (CAST(strftime('%m', dt) AS INTEGER) = 11 AND CAST(strftime('%d', dt) AS INTEGER) = 11)  -- Veterans Day
      AND NOT (CAST(strftime('%m', dt) AS INTEGER) = 12 AND CAST(strftime('%d', dt) AS INTEGER) = 25)  -- Christmas Day
)
SELECT
    u.Id,
    u.DisplayName,
    u.Age,
    COUNT(w.dt) AS TotalDays
FROM
    users u
LEFT JOIN workdays w
    ON w.dt >= DATE(u.CreationDate)
   AND w.dt <= DATE(u.LastAccessDate)
GROUP BY
    u.Id, u.DisplayName, u.Age
ORDER BY
    u.Id

        CAST(AVG(TotalAmount) OVER (ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS DECIMAL(10,2)) AS MovingAvg,
        COUNT(*) OVER (ORDER BY Date ASC ROWS BETWEEN 2 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS FrameSize
    FROM DAILY_REVENUE

WITH RECURSIVE set_hierarchy AS (
    -- Base case: start with sets that have a parent
    SELECT 
        s.id,
        s.code,
        s.parentCode,
        s.code AS ancestralCode,
        s.parentCode AS nextParent
    FROM sets s
    WHERE s.parentCode IS NOT NULL

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: follow the parent chain
    SELECT 
        sh.id,
        sh.code,
        sh.parentCode,
        sh.ancestralCode || '-' || p.code AS ancestralCode,
        p.parentCode AS nextParent
    FROM set_hierarchy sh
    JOIN sets p ON p.code = sh.nextParent
)
SELECT 
    sh.id,
    sh.code,
    sh.ancestralCode
FROM set_hierarchy sh
WHERE sh.nextParent IS NULL

SELECT 
    link_to_event,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Closed'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
             AND SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Open'
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'Planning'
        ELSE 'Unknown'
    END AS event_status,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
            THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Closed' THEN remaining ELSE NULL END)
        WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
             AND SUM(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 
            THEN MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Open' THEN spent ELSE NULL END) 
               + MAX(CASE WHEN event_status = 'Planning' THEN spent ELSE NULL END)
        ELSE MAX(remaining)
    END AS remaining_fund
FROM budget
GROUP BY link_to_event

        s.School,
        s.FundingType,

    FROM schools s

  AND (
      (wp.PreviousSchool IS NULL AND wp.School IS NOT NULL)
      OR (wp.PreviousSchool IS NOT NULL AND wp.School IS NULL)
      OR (wp.PreviousSchool <> wp.School)

WITH numbered AS (
    SELECT 
        trans_id,
        account_id,
        date,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY date, trans_id) AS rn
    FROM trans
),
categorized AS (
    -- Base case: first transaction per account is always 'New'
    SELECT 
        trans_id,
        account_id,
        date,
        rn,
        CAST('New' AS nvarchar(10)) AS Category
    FROM numbered
    WHERE rn = 1

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: compare with previous transaction
    SELECT 
        n.trans_id,
        n.account_id,
        n.date,
        n.rn,
        CAST(
            CASE 
                WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, c.date, n.date) <= 30 THEN 'Followup'
                ELSE 'New'
            END AS nvarchar(10)
        ) AS Category
    FROM numbered n
    INNER JOIN categorized c
        ON n.account_id = c.account_id
        AND n.rn = c.rn + 1
)
SELECT TOP 10
    trans_id,
    account_id,
    date,
    Category
FROM categorized
ORDER BY trans_id

DECLARE @STARTDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-04'
DECLARE @ENDDATE NVARCHAR(100) = '1995-04-05'


CREATE TABLE #TransTypes (
    TransType NVARCHAR(50)
)


INSERT INTO #TransTypes
SELECT DISTINCT [type]
FROM trans
WHERE [date] BETWEEN CAST(@STARTDATE AS DATE) AND CAST(@ENDDATE AS DATE)


DECLARE @cols NVARCHAR(MAX) = STUFF(
(
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ', ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)')
, 1, 2, '')


IF @cols IS NOT NULL AND @cols <> ''
BEGIN

DECLARE @sql NVARCHAR(MAX) =
N'
WITH DateRange AS (
    SELECT DATEADD(DAY, number, CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE)) AS FullDate
    FROM master.dbo.spt_values
    WHERE type = ''P'' 
    AND DATEADD(DAY, number, CAST(''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AS DATE)) <= CAST(''' + @ENDDATE + ''' AS DATE)
)
SELECT dr.FullDate AS Date, ' +

STUFF((
    SELECT ', COALESCE(' + QUOTENAME(TransType) + ', 0) AS ' + QUOTENAME(TransType)
    FROM #TransTypes
    FOR XML PATH(''), TYPE
).value('.', 'NVARCHAR(MAX)'), 1, 2, '') +
N'
FROM DateRange dr
LEFT JOIN 
(
    SELECT 
        CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120) AS Transaction_Date,
        [type],
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM trans
    WHERE [date] BETWEEN ''' + @STARTDATE + ''' AND ''' + @ENDDATE + '''
    GROUP BY CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), [date], 120), [type]
) s
PIVOT
(
    SUM(n)
    FOR [type] IN (' + @cols + ')
) pvt ON dr.FullDate = CAST(pvt.Transaction_Date AS DATE)
ORDER BY dr.FullDate;
'

DROP TABLE #TransTypes

EXEC sp_executesql @sql

END
ELSE
BEGIN
    PRINT 'No transaction types found in the specified date range.'
    DROP TABLE #TransTypes
END

WITH
-- Step 1: Merge overlapping blackout periods
spell_starts AS (
    SELECT [start_date], [end_date]
    FROM blackout_periods s1
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM blackout_periods s2
        WHERE s2.[start_date] < s1.[start_date]
          AND s1.[start_date] <= s2.[end_date]
    )
),
spell_ends AS (
    SELECT [start_date], [end_date]
    FROM blackout_periods t1
    WHERE NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM blackout_periods t2
        WHERE t2.[start_date] <= t1.[end_date]
          AND t1.[end_date] < t2.[end_date]
    )
),
merged_blackouts AS (
    SELECT s.[start_date], MIN(e.[end_date]) AS [end_date]
    FROM spell_starts s
    INNER JOIN spell_ends e
        ON s.[start_date] <= e.[end_date]
    GROUP BY s.[start_date]
),
-- Step 2: Invert merged blackout periods to find non-blackout windows
inverse_blackouts AS (
    SELECT [start_date], [end_date]
    FROM (
        SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, [end_date]) AS [start_date],
               LEAD(DATEADD(DAY, -1, [start_date])) OVER (ORDER BY [start_date]) AS [end_date]
        FROM merged_blackouts

        UNION ALL

        SELECT CAST('1900-01-01' AS date) AS [start_date],
               DATEADD(DAY, -1, MIN([start_date])) AS [end_date]
        FROM merged_blackouts

        UNION ALL

        SELECT DATEADD(DAY, 1, MAX([end_date])) AS [start_date],
               CAST('9999-01-01' AS date) AS [end_date]
        FROM merged_blackouts
    ) k
    WHERE [start_date] <= [end_date]
),
-- Step 3: Intersect account activity periods with non-blackout windows
result AS (
    SELECT
        IIF(a.start_date > nb.start_date, a.start_date, nb.start_date) AS start_date,
        IIF(a.end_date < nb.end_date, a.end_date, nb.end_date) AS end_date
    FROM account_activity a
    INNER JOIN inverse_blackouts nb
        ON a.start_date <= nb.end_date
       AND nb.start_date <= a.end_date
)
SELECT start_date, end_date
FROM result
WHERE start_date <= end_date
ORDER BY start_date

WITH OrderedExps AS (
    SELECT 
        exp_id,
        mid,
        qty,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY exp_id) AS rn
    FROM Experiment
    WHERE mid = 2
),
CTE AS (
    -- Base case: first experiment
    SELECT 
        e.exp_id,
        e.mid,
        e.qty AS required_qty,
        i.qty AS initial_stock,
        e.rn,
        CASE 
            WHEN i.qty >= e.qty THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS executable,
        CASE 
            WHEN i.qty >= e.qty THEN i.qty - e.qty 
            ELSE i.qty 
        END AS remaining_stock
    FROM OrderedExps e
    INNER JOIN Inventory i ON i.mid = e.mid
    WHERE e.rn = 1

    UNION ALL

    -- Recursive case: subsequent experiments
    SELECT 
        e.exp_id,
        e.mid,
        e.qty AS required_qty,
        c.initial_stock,
        e.rn,
        CASE 
            WHEN c.remaining_stock >= e.qty THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS executable,
        CASE 
            WHEN c.remaining_stock >= e.qty THEN c.remaining_stock - e.qty 
            ELSE c.remaining_stock 
        END AS remaining_stock
    FROM OrderedExps e
    INNER JOIN CTE c ON c.rn + 1 = e.rn
)
SELECT 
    exp_id,
    mid,
    executable
FROM CTE
ORDER BY exp_id

        DATEADD(MINUTE, (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5) * 5, 0) AS clamped_time,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY DATEADD(MINUTE, (DATEDIFF(MINUTE, 0, [date]) / 5) * 5, 0)
            ORDER BY [date] ASC
        ) AS rn
    FROM trans
)
SELECT
    b.clamped_time,
    MAX(CASE WHEN b.rn = 1 THEN b.amount END) AS [Open],
    MIN(b.balance) AS Low
FROM bucketed b
GROUP BY b.clamped_time
ORDER BY b.clamped_time

WITH hero_activity AS (
    SELECT id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id
    FROM (VALUES 
        (1, '2023-01-01', 10, 1),
        (2, '2023-01-02', 20, 1),
        (3, '2023-02-01', 15, 1),
        (4, '2023-02-02', 25, 1),
        (5, '2023-01-03', 30, 2),
        (6, '2023-02-03', 40, 2)
    ) AS t (id, activity_date, activity_value, hero_id)
),
monthly_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        YEAR(activity_date) AS yr,
        MONTH(activity_date) AS mn,
        SUM(activity_value) AS month_total
    FROM hero_activity
    GROUP BY YEAR(activity_date), MONTH(activity_date)
),
monthly_with_prev AS (
    SELECT 
        yr,
        mn,
        month_total,
        LAG(month_total) OVER (ORDER BY yr, mn) AS prev_month_total
    FROM monthly_totals
)
SELECT 
    ha.id,
    ha.activity_date,
    ha.activity_value,
    SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
        ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id
    ) AS run_tot,
    SUM(ha.activity_value) OVER (
        PARTITION BY YEAR(ha.activity_date), MONTH(ha.activity_date)
        ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id
    ) AS m_run_tot,
    COALESCE(mp.prev_month_total, 0) AS required_output
FROM hero_activity ha
JOIN monthly_with_prev mp
    ON YEAR(ha.activity_date) = mp.yr
    AND MONTH(ha.activity_date) = mp.mn
ORDER BY ha.activity_date, ha.id

WITH RaceResults AS (

        res.constructorId,

        res.points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.raceId, res.constructorId ORDER BY res.points DESC) AS constructorDriverRank

    INNER JOIN results AS res ON r.raceId = res.raceId

    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
ConstructorPerformance AS (

SELECT

        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY p.ID) AS ExamCount
    FROM Patient AS p

    WHERE (p.SEX = 'F' OR e.Thrombosis = 1)

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT
        r.raceId,
        r.year,
        r.date,
        res.driverId,
        res.points,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY res.driverId ORDER BY r.year, r.date) AS CareerRaceNumber
    FROM results res
    JOIN races r ON res.raceId = r.raceId
    WHERE res.position IS NOT NULL
),
DriverFirstFiveRaces AS (
    SELECT
        driverId,
        raceId,
        points,
        CareerRaceNumber
    FROM RaceResults
    WHERE CareerRaceNumber <= 5
)
SELECT
    d.driverId,
    d.forename + ' ' + d.surname AS DriverName,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 1 THEN points END) AS Race1_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 2 THEN points END) AS Race2_Points,
    MAX(CASE WHEN CareerRaceNumber = 3 THEN points END) AS Race3_Points,

WITH RaceResults AS (

    INNER JOIN drivers d ON res.driverId = d.driverId
    WHERE CAST(res.positionText AS INT) <= 3
)
SELECT

    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3
FROM RaceResults rr
WHERE position_rank = 1
GROUP BY rr.raceId
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC, rr.raceId

WITH DriverGroups AS (

        CASE
            WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
            ELSE nationality
        END AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN
            CAST(min_code AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) + N'-' + CAST(max_code AS NVARCHAR(MAX))
        ELSE
            CAST(max_code AS NVARCHAR(MAX))
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT
        ISNULL(nationality, 'Unknown') AS driver_group,
        code
    FROM drivers
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
),
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT
        driver_group,
        MIN(code) AS min_code,
        MAX(code) AS max_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count
    FROM DriverGroups
    GROUP BY driver_group
)
SELECT
    driver_group,
    CASE
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN CONCAT(min_code, '-', max_code)
        ELSE max_code
    END AS concat_codes
FROM GroupedCodes
ORDER BY driver_group

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT
        AVG(CAST(BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgBuildupplaySpeed,
        AVG(CAST(DEFENCETEAMWIDTH AS DECIMAL(10,2))) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES
    WHERE BUILDUPPLAYSPEED IS NOT NULL
    AND DEFENCETEAMWIDTH IS NOT NULL
),
FilteredTeams AS (
    SELECT
        TA.ID,
        TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
        TA.BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
        TA.CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
        TA.DEFENCEPRESSURE,
        TA.DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
        TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date DESC) AS LatestRecord
    FROM TEAM_ATTRIBUTES AS TA
    JOIN TeamAverages AS TA_AVG ON
        TA.BUILDUPPLAYSPEED > TA_AVG.AvgBuildupplaySpeed AND
        TA.DEFENCETEAMWIDTH < TA_AVG.AvgDefenceTeamWidth
)
SELECT
    ID,
    BUILDUPPLAYSPEED,
    BUILDUPPLAYPASSING,
    CHANCECREATIONPASSING,
    CHANCECREATIONCROSSING,
    CHANCECREATIONSHOOTING,
    DEFENCEPRESSURE,
    DEFENCEAGGRESSION,
    DEFENCETEAMWIDTH
FROM FilteredTeams
WHERE LatestRecord = 1
ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED DESC, DEFENCETEAMWIDTH ASC

WITH TeamWindowData AS (
    SELECT
        TA.id,
        TA.team_api_id,
        TA.date,
        TA.buildUpPlaySpeed,
        TA.buildUpPlayPassing,
        TA.chanceCreationShooting,
        TA.defenceTeamWidth,
        LEAD(TA.buildUpPlaySpeed) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(TA.buildUpPlayPassing) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS next_buildUpPlayPassing,
        LAG(TA.defenceTeamWidth) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS prev_defenceTeamWidth,
        LAG(TA.chanceCreationShooting) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id ORDER BY TA.date) AS prev_chanceCreationShooting,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TA.team_api_id) AS team_record_count
    FROM Team_Attributes AS TA
)
SELECT
    id,
    team_api_id,
    date,
    buildUpPlaySpeed,
    buildUpPlayPassing,
    chanceCreationShooting,
    defenceTeamWidth,
    next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    next_buildUpPlayPassing,
    prev_defenceTeamWidth,
    prev_chanceCreationShooting,
    team_record_count
FROM TeamWindowData
WHERE team_record_count > 1
  AND prev_defenceTeamWidth > buildUpPlaySpeed
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

WITH cte AS

    SELECT 
        id,
        [Examination Date],
        thrombosis,
        risklag = LAG(thrombosis, 1, thrombosis) OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY [Examination Date]),
        rn = ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id, YEAR([Examination Date]), MONTH([Examination Date]) ORDER BY [Examination Date] DESC)
    FROM examination
)
SELECT 
    id,
    startofmonth = CONVERT(DATE, DATEADD(MONTH, DATEDIFF(MONTH, CAST('19000101' AS DATE), CAST([Examination Date] AS DATE)), CAST('19000101' AS DATE))),
    increase_risk = CASE
                        WHEN risklag < thrombosis THEN 'Yes'
                        ELSE 'No'
                    END,
    decrease_risk = CASE
                        WHEN risklag > thrombosis THEN 'Yes'
                        ELSE 'No'
                    END
FROM cte
WHERE rn = 1
  AND risklag = 0

WITH t AS

          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id
                             ORDER BY e.[Examination Date]) AS seqnum
   FROM examination AS e),
     cte AS
  (SELECT t.id,
          t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
          t.seqnum,
          'N' AS isrehire,
          t.[Examination Date] AS anchordate
   FROM t
   WHERE t.seqnum = 1
   UNION ALL SELECT t.id,
                    t.[Examination Date] AS startdate,
                    t.seqnum,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN 'Y'
                        ELSE 'N'
                    END AS isrehire,
                    CASE
                        WHEN t.[Examination Date] > DATEADD(YEAR, 1, cte.anchordate) THEN t.[Examination Date]
                        ELSE cte.anchordate
                    END AS anchordate
   FROM cte
   INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1)
SELECT id,
       startdate,
       seqnum,
       isrehire
FROM cte
ORDER BY id,
         startdate

WITH T_period_futur AS
  (SELECT 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          CAST('2021-10-25' AS DATE) AS Tpf_start_period
   UNION ALL 
   SELECT Tpf_period_id + 1 AS Tpf_period_id,
          DATEADD(WEEK, 1, Tpf_start_period)
   FROM T_period_futur
   WHERE Tpf_period_id < 12)
SELECT Tpf_period_id,
       Tpf_start_period,
       YEAR(Tpf_start_period) AS Tpf_year,

        (DATEDIFF(DAY, '2007-01-01', 
            DATEADD(DAY, 
                - (DATEDIFF(DAY, '19000101', CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)) % 7), 
                CAST(originalreleasedate AS DATE)
            )
        ) / 7) + 1 AS week_number
    FROM cards
    WHERE originalreleasedate IS NOT NULL
      AND TRY_CONVERT(DATE, originalreleasedate) IS NOT NULL
      AND originalreleasedate >= '2007-01-01'

   FROM Examination AS e)

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS
  (SELECT P.ID,
          P.PLAYER_NAME,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Aaron') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Aaron'
          END AS COLAKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Cresswell') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell'
          END AS COLBKEYWORD,
          CASE
              WHEN PATINDEX('%' + LOWER('Doran') + '%', LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME)) > 0 THEN 'Doran'
          END AS COLCKEYWORD
   FROM PLAYER AS P),
     KEYWORDSCORES AS
  (SELECT KM.ID,
          KM.PLAYER_NAME,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + INNERKM.COLAKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND INNERKM.COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSA,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + INNERKM.COLBKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND INNERKM.COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSB,
          STUFF(
                  (SELECT ', ' + INNERKM.COLCKEYWORD
                   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS INNERKM
                   WHERE INNERKM.ID = KM.ID
                     AND INNERKM.COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL
                     FOR XML PATH ('') ), 1, 2, '') AS KEYWORDSC,
          CASE
              WHEN KM.COLAKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 10
              ELSE 0
          END AS COLASCORE,
          CASE
              WHEN KM.COLBKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 5
              ELSE 0
          END AS COLBSCORE,
          CASE
              WHEN KM.COLCKEYWORD IS NOT NULL THEN 0.1
              ELSE 0
          END AS COLCSCORE
   FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM)
SELECT KS.ID,
       KS.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION,
       (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) AS SCORE
FROM KEYWORDSCORES AS KS
WHERE (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) > 0
ORDER BY (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) DESC

WITH MoleculeBonds AS (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        MIN(
            CASE 
                WHEN bond_type = '-' THEN 1 
                WHEN bond_type = '=' THEN 2 
                WHEN bond_type = '#' THEN 3 
            END
        ) AS min_bond_rank,
        COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) AS distinct_bond_count
    FROM bond
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT bond_type) > 1
)
SELECT 
    mb.molecule_id,
    CASE min_bond_rank
        WHEN 1 THEN '-'
        WHEN 2 THEN '='
        WHEN 3 THEN '#'
    END AS bond_type
FROM MoleculeBonds mb
ORDER BY mb.molecule_id

WITH member_data AS (

tokenized_members AS (
    SELECT
        a."link_to_event",
        LEVEL AS position,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+', 1, LEVEL) AS member_token
    FROM "attendance_trunc" a
    CONNECT BY
        LEVEL <= REGEXP_COUNT(a."link_to_member", '[^|]+') AND
        PRIOR a.ROWID = a.ROWID AND
        PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL
),
member_names AS (
    SELECT
        tm."link_to_event",
        tm.position,
        COALESCE(md.member_name, 'Unknown Member') AS member_name
    FROM tokenized_members tm
    LEFT JOIN member_data md ON (tm.member_token = md.member_id AND md.rn = 1)
)

    AND l_missing.NAME = l_existing.NAME 
    AND l_missing.GUID != l_existing.GUID
JOIN GROUPS g ON g.ROOM_GUID = l_existing.GUID
WHERE l_missing.GUID NOT IN (SELECT ROOM_GUID FROM GROUPS)

WITH years AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BL."TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS bond_year
    FROM "BOND_LIST" BL
    WHERE BL."TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
),
all_combinations AS (
    SELECT
        y.bond_year,
        br."BOND_TYPE",
        br."BOND_SEQ"
    FROM years y
    CROSS JOIN "BOND_REF" br
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BL."TRANSACT_DT_TM") AS bond_year,
        BL."BOND_TYPE",
        COUNT(*) AS bond_count
    FROM "BOND_LIST" BL
    WHERE BL."TRANSACT_DT_TM" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY EXTRACT(YEAR FROM BL."TRANSACT_DT_TM"), BL."BOND_TYPE"
)
SELECT
    ac.bond_year AS "year",
    ac."BOND_TYPE" AS bond_type,
    ac."BOND_SEQ" AS bond_seq,
    NVL(bc.bond_count, 0) AS bond_count
FROM all_combinations ac
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc
    ON ac.bond_year = bc.bond_year
    AND ac."BOND_TYPE" = bc."BOND_TYPE"
ORDER BY
    ac.bond_year,
    ac."BOND_SEQ"

WITH temp AS

          a."molecule_id",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY a."molecule_id"
                             ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$'))) - TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a."atom_id", '\d+$')) AS grp
   FROM "atom" a), temp2 AS
  (SELECT t."atom_id",
          t."molecule_id",
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY t."molecule_id", t.grp) AS cnt
   FROM temp t)

SELECT
    school_id,
    MIN(start_date) AS first_start,
    MAX(end_date) AS last_end
FROM
(
    SELECT
        school_id,
        start_date,
        end_date,
        SUM(new_group_flag) OVER (PARTITION BY school_id ORDER BY start_date, end_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS grp
    FROM
    (
        SELECT
            school_id,
            start_date,
            end_date,
            CASE
                WHEN start_date <= MAX(end_date) OVER (
                    PARTITION BY school_id
                    ORDER BY start_date, end_date
                    ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING
                )
                THEN 0
                ELSE 1
            END AS new_group_flag
        FROM SCHOOL_INFO
    )
)
GROUP BY school_id, grp
ORDER BY school_id, first_start

WITH set_a (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
    SELECT molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT element)
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
    HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT element) > 1
),
set_b (molecule_id, element_count) AS (
    SELECT m.molecule_id, COUNT(DISTINCT a.element)
    FROM molecule m
    JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    WHERE m.label IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id
),
unique_a (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        element_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
    FROM set_a
),
unique_b (molecule_id, element_count, rn, density_rank) AS (
    SELECT
        molecule_id,
        element_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY molecule_id ORDER BY element_count) AS rn,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY element_count DESC) AS density_rank
    FROM set_b
)
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.rn = b.rn AND a.density_rank = b.density_rank THEN 1 END) AS num_identical_in_a_and_b,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN a.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_a,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN b.molecule_id IS NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_not_identical_in_b
FROM unique_a a
FULL OUTER JOIN unique_b b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id AND a.rn = b.rn
WHERE
    EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM bond
        WHERE bond.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND bond.bond_id = 'TR011_2_24'
    )
    AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM connected c
        JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
        JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
        WHERE a1.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
        AND a1.element = a2.element
    )

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT
        "date",
        "match_api_id",
        EXTRACT(HOUR FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP)) +
        EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM CAST("date" AS TIMESTAMP)) / 60 AS hour_of_day,
        TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS match_date_str
    FROM "Match"
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour FROM DUAL
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT
        mt."date",
        mt."match_api_id",
        mt.match_date_str,
        mt.hour_of_day,
        tt.target_hour,
        CASE
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 8 THEN 'morning'
            WHEN tt.target_hour = 20 THEN 'evening'
        END AS time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_str, tt.target_hour
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour)
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times mt
    CROSS JOIN target_times tt
)
SELECT
    TO_DATE(dc.match_date_str || ' ' ||
           LPAD(FLOOR(dc.target_hour), 2, '0') || ':00:00',
           'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS target_datetime,
    dc."date",
    dc."match_api_id",
    dc.time_period,
    dc.time_distance,
    dc.hour_of_day AS actual_hours,
    RANK() OVER (
        PARTITION BY dc.match_date_str, dc.time_period
        ORDER BY dc.time_distance, dc."match_api_id"
    ) AS final_rank
FROM distance_calc dc
WHERE dc.time_rank <= 1
  AND dc.time_distance <=
      CASE
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 8 THEN 4
          WHEN dc.target_hour = 20 THEN 3
      END
ORDER BY
    dc.match_date_str,
    dc.target_hour,
    dc.time_distance

WITH "my_table" AS
  (SELECT 'A' AS "cto",
          1 AS "nif",
          'A1' AS "file_",
          5 AS "filesize"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4 FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6 FROM dual)
SELECT "cto",
       "nif",
       "file_",
       "partition",
       "mn" - "first_mn" + 1 AS "subpartition",
       "total_size"
FROM
  (SELECT *
   FROM
     (SELECT t.*,
             ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "cto"
                                ORDER BY SUBSTR("file_", 1, 1), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR("file_", 2))) AS "rn",
             SUM("filesize") OVER (PARTITION BY "cto", "nif") AS "nif_size"
      FROM "my_table" t)
   MATCH_RECOGNIZE(
     PARTITION BY "cto"
     ORDER BY "rn"
     MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "mn",
              SUM("filesize") AS "total_size"
     ALL ROWS PER MATCH
     PATTERN ((same_nif* nif)* same_nif* end_nif)
     DEFINE
       same_nif AS "nif" = NEXT("nif"),
       nif AS ("nif" != NEXT("nif") OR NEXT("nif") IS NULL)
              AND SUM("filesize") + NEXT("nif_size") <= 10,
       end_nif AS SUM("filesize") <= 10
   ))
MATCH_RECOGNIZE(
  PARTITION BY "cto"
  ORDER BY "rn"
  MEASURES MATCH_NUMBER() AS "partition",
           FIRST("mn") AS "first_mn"
  ALL ROWS PER MATCH
  PATTERN ((same_nif* nif)+)
  DEFINE
    same_nif AS "nif" = NEXT("nif"),
    nif AS ("nif" != NEXT("nif") OR NEXT("nif") IS NULL)
           AND "mn" - FIRST("mn") < 7
)

WITH tbl AS
  (SELECT TO_DATE('12.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS act_date FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('31.01.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('13.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('17.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('19.02.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('12.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('27.03.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT TO_DATE('10.04.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') FROM dual),
     months_list AS
  (SELECT TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy') AS month_label,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS month_key
   FROM tbl t
   GROUP BY TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'MON-yy'),
            TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm')),
     grid AS
  (SELECT t1.month_label AS activation_month,
          t1.month_key AS rn_1,
          t2.month_label AS act_month,
          t2.month_key AS rn_2
   FROM months_list t1
   LEFT JOIN months_list t2 ON t1.month_key <= t2.month_key),
     molecule_activity AS
  (SELECT ROWNUM AS molecule_id,
          TO_CHAR(t.act_date, 'yyyymm') AS act_date
   FROM tbl t)
SELECT g.activation_month,
       g.act_month,
       g.rn_1,
       g.rn_2,
       CASE
           WHEN g.rn_1 = g.rn_2 THEN
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma.molecule_id)
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date = g.rn_1)
           ELSE
                  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ma.molecule_id)
                   FROM molecule_activity ma
                   WHERE ma.act_date BETWEEN g.rn_1 AND g.rn_2)
       END AS active_molecules
FROM grid g
ORDER BY g.rn_1,
         g.rn_2

WITH "credits" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        12 AS "ARTCRED",
        7.5 AS "BIZCRED",
        12 AS "HUMCRED",
        14 AS "NATCRED",
        11 AS "TEKCRED",
        9 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        15 AS "ARTCRED",
        9 AS "BIZCRED",
        14 AS "HUMCRED",
        16 AS "NATCRED",
        13 AS "TEKCRED",
        11 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2020', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        10.5 AS "ARTCRED",
        6 AS "BIZCRED",
        5 AS "HUMCRED",
        4 AS "NATCRED",
        6 AS "TEKCRED",
        3 AS "GENCRED",
        TO_DATE('01.01.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "EFFECTIVE_DATE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"grp_choices" AS (
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('03.03.2010', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'BIZ' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('05.05.2015', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5001 AS "ID",
        'NAT' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2022', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        5002 AS "ID",
        'ART' AS "GROUPCHOICE",
        TO_DATE('23.06.2023', 'dd.mm.yyyy') AS "DATECHOICE"
    FROM DUAL
),

"matched_credits" AS (
    SELECT
        G."ID",
        G."GROUPCHOICE",
        G."DATECHOICE",
        C."ARTCRED",
        C."BIZCRED",
        C."HUMCRED",
        C."NATCRED",
        C."TEKCRED",
        C."GENCRED",
        C."EFFECTIVE_DATE",
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY G."ID", G."GROUPCHOICE", G."DATECHOICE" ORDER BY C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" DESC) AS RN
    FROM "grp_choices" G
    JOIN "credits" C ON G."ID" = C."ID" AND C."EFFECTIVE_DATE" <= G."DATECHOICE"
)

SELECT
    M."ID",
    M."GROUPCHOICE",
    CASE
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'ART' THEN M."ARTCRED"
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'BIZ' THEN M."BIZCRED"
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'HUM' THEN M."HUMCRED"
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'NAT' THEN M."NATCRED"
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'TEK' THEN M."TEKCRED"
        WHEN M."GROUPCHOICE" = 'GEN' THEN M."GENCRED"
        ELSE 0
    END AS "TOTAL_CREDITS"
FROM "matched_credits" M
WHERE M.RN = 1
ORDER BY M."ID", M."GROUPCHOICE"

WITH molecule_atoms AS

   FROM "atom"
   GROUP BY "molecule_id")
SELECT "molecule_id",

FROM molecule_atoms
CONNECT BY level <= atom_count
AND PRIOR "molecule_id" = "molecule_id"
AND PRIOR SYS_GUID() IS NOT NULL

SELECT "team_api_id",
       "buildUpPlaySpeed",
       "date"
FROM
  (SELECT "team_api_id",
          "buildUpPlaySpeed",
          "date",
          ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id"
                             ORDER BY "date" DESC) AS seq
   FROM "Team_Attributes")
