WITH player_data AS (
    SELECT
        p.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'name' AS attribute_type,
        TO_CHAR(p.player_name) AS attribute_value
    FROM Player p
    WHERE p.player_api_id IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'rating' AS attribute_type,
        TO_CHAR(pa.overall_rating) AS attribute_value
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(pa2.date)
        FROM Player_Attributes pa2
        WHERE pa2.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
    UNION ALL
    SELECT
        pa.player_api_id AS player_id,
        'foot' AS attribute_type,
        TO_CHAR(pa.preferred_foot) AS attribute_value
    FROM Player_Attributes pa
    WHERE pa.date = (
        SELECT MAX(pa2.date)
        FROM Player_Attributes pa2
        WHERE pa2.player_api_id = pa.player_api_id
    )
),
player_dedup AS (
    SELECT
        player_id,
        attribute_type,
        attribute_value,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY player_id, attribute_type ORDER BY attribute_value) AS rn
    FROM player_data
)
SELECT
    player_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'name' THEN attribute_value END) AS name,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END) AS rating,
    MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'foot' THEN attribute_value END) AS preferred_foot
FROM player_dedup
WHERE rn = 1
GROUP BY player_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT attribute_type) = 3
ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(
    NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN attribute_type = 'rating' THEN attribute_value END), '0')
) DESC
FETCH FIRST 10 ROWS ONLY

WITH match_stats AS (
    SELECT
        "m"."date" AS "match_date",
        "l"."name" AS "league_name",
        "c"."name" AS "country_name",
        CAST("ht"."team_long_name" AS VARCHAR2(512)) AS "home_team",
        CAST("at"."team_long_name" AS VARCHAR2(512)) AS "away_team",
        "m"."home_team_goal" AS "home_team_goals",
        "m"."away_team_goal" AS "away_team_goals",
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY "m"."league_id", CAST("m"."season" AS VARCHAR2(100))
                     ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" + "m"."away_team_goal" DESC) AS "high_scoring_rank"
    FROM "Match" "m"
    INNER JOIN "League" "l" ON "m"."league_id" = "l"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Country" "c" ON "m"."country_id" = "c"."id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "ht" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ht"."team_api_id"
    INNER JOIN "Team" "at" ON "m"."away_team_api_id" = "at"."team_api_id"
),
team_performance AS (
    SELECT
        "team_long_name",
        COUNT(*) AS "total_matches",
        SUM(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "goals_scored",
        AVG(CASE WHEN "home_team" = "team_long_name" THEN "home_team_goals" ELSE "away_team_goals" END) AS "avg_goals_per_match"
    FROM (
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "home_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
        UNION ALL
        SELECT
            "match_date", "home_team", "away_team", "home_team_goals", "away_team_goals",
            "away_team" AS "team_long_name"
        FROM match_stats
    )
    GROUP BY "team_long_name"
)
SELECT
    ms."match_date",
    ms."league_name",
    ms."country_name",
    ms."home_team",
    ms."away_team",
    ms."home_team_goals",
    ms."away_team_goals",
    ms."high_scoring_rank",
    htp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "home_team_avg_goals",
    atp."avg_goals_per_match" AS "away_team_avg_goals"
FROM match_stats ms
LEFT JOIN team_performance htp ON ms."home_team" = htp."team_long_name"
LEFT JOIN team_performance atp ON ms."away_team" = atp."team_long_name"
WHERE ms."high_scoring_rank" <= 10
ORDER BY ms."match_date" DESC

WITH "MY_TABLE" AS
  (SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '1111' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '2222' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    '50000' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT '3333' AS "TECHNICAL_ID",
                    'DUMMY' AS "ASSET_TYPE"
   FROM DUAL),
     "MAP_RECRF_ASSET_TYPE" AS
  (SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
          'NOTIONALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
          1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'NOTIONALDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    1 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'FWDNOTLDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWOFFBALDR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLCR' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL
   UNION ALL SELECT 'SW' AS "APPLICATION",
                    'SWFWNOTLDB' AS "ASSET_TYPE",
                    2 AS "PRIORITY"
   FROM DUAL

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT m."country_id",
           m."date",
           m."league_id",
           CAST(m."season" AS VARCHAR2(512)) AS season_val,
           DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."country_id" ORDER BY m."date" DESC) AS match_rank
    FROM "Match" m
    WHERE m."date" IS NOT NULL
),
country_stats AS (
    SELECT c."id" AS country_id,
           c."name" AS country_name,
           COUNT(DISTINCT m."league_id") AS league_count,
           COUNT(DISTINCT CAST(m."season" AS VARCHAR2(512))) AS season_count
    FROM "Country" c
    LEFT JOIN "Match" m ON c."id" = m."country_id"
    GROUP BY c."id", c."name"
),
match_summary AS (
    SELECT md."country_id",
           md."date",
           md.match_rank,
           LISTAGG(CAST(l."name" AS VARCHAR2(512)), ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY CAST(l."name" AS VARCHAR2(512))) AS leagues_played
    FROM match_dates md
    JOIN "League" l ON md."league_id" = l."id"
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2
    GROUP BY md."country_id", md."date", md.match_rank
)
SELECT cs.country_id,
       cs.country_name,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) AS last_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms."date" END) AS prev_match_date,
       MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues,
       cs.league_count,
       cs.season_count
FROM country_stats cs
LEFT JOIN match_summary ms ON cs.country_id = ms."country_id"
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms."date" END) DESC

SELECT a.atom_id,
       a.molecule_id,
       a.element,
       c.bond_id,

FROM "atom" a
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id

SELECT "t"."team_api_id",
       "m"."id",
       "m"."home_team_api_id",
       "m"."away_team_api_id",
       "m"."home_team_goal",
       "m"."away_team_goal",
       SUM(CASE
               WHEN "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id" THEN "m"."home_team_goal" - "m"."away_team_goal"
               ELSE "m"."away_team_goal" - "m"."home_team_goal"
           END) OVER (PARTITION BY "t"."team_api_id"
                      ORDER BY "m"."id") AS "goal_difference"
FROM "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN "Team" "t" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
OR "m"."away_team_api_id" = "t"."team_api_id"
WHERE "m"."date" = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')
ORDER BY "t"."team_api_id",
         "m"."id"

WITH atom_stats AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(a.atom_id) AS atom_count,
        LISTAGG(a.element, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS elements
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_hierarchy AS (
    SELECT
        bond_id,
        molecule_id,
        bond_type,
        REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 1) AS molecule_prefix,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 2)) AS first_atom_num,
        TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(bond_id, '[^_]+', 1, 3)) AS second_atom_num
    FROM bond
),
molecule_connectivity AS (
    SELECT
        m.molecule_id,
        m.label,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.atom_id) AS connected_atoms,
        COUNT(DISTINCT c.bond_id) AS bond_count,
        CASE
            WHEN m.label = '+' THEN 'Positive'
            WHEN m.label = '-' THEN 'Negative'
            ELSE 'Neutral'
        END AS charge_type
    FROM molecule m
    LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
    LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
    GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type,
    ast.atom_count,
    ast.elements,
    bh.first_atom_num + bh.second_atom_num AS atom_sum,
    mc.connected_atoms,
    mc.charge_type,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY a.atom_id) AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.molecule_id ORDER BY b.bond_type) AS bond_type_rank
FROM molecule m
INNER JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
INNER JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
INNER JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
LEFT JOIN atom_stats ast ON m.molecule_id = ast.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_hierarchy bh ON b.bond_id = bh.bond_id
LEFT JOIN molecule_connectivity mc ON m.molecule_id = mc.molecule_id
WHERE a.element IN (SELECT DISTINCT element FROM atom WHERE molecule_id LIKE 'TR%')
  AND b.bond_type IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    atom_rank,
    bh.first_atom_num

SELECT T."team_long_name",

SELECT "valid_from",
       "valid_until",
       "count"
FROM
  (SELECT "dt" AS "valid_from",
          LEAD("dt") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") - INTERVAL '1' SECOND AS "valid_until",
          SUM("type") OVER (ORDER BY "dt") AS "count"
   FROM
     (SELECT "valid_from" AS "dt", 1 AS "type"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM DUAL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM DUAL)
      UNION ALL
      SELECT "valid_until" + INTERVAL '1' DAY AS "dt", -1 AS "type"
      FROM
        (SELECT TO_DATE('2014-01-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-01-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM DUAL
         UNION ALL
         SELECT TO_DATE('2014-02-01', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_from",
                TO_DATE('2014-02-28', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "valid_until"
         FROM DUAL)))
WHERE "count" > 0
  AND ("valid_from" <= "valid_until"
       OR "valid_until" IS NULL)

DECLARE 
  v_molecule_id NVARCHAR2(512);
  v_label NCLOB;
  v_atom_id NVARCHAR2(512);
  v_element NCLOB;
  v_atom_id2 NVARCHAR2(512);
  v_bond_id NVARCHAR2(512);
  v_bond_type NCLOB;
BEGIN
  SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
         "m"."label",
         "a"."atom_id",
         "a"."element",
         "c"."atom_id2",
         "b"."bond_id",
         "b"."bond_type"
    INTO v_molecule_id,
         v_label,
         v_atom_id,
         v_element,
         v_atom_id2,
         v_bond_id,
         v_bond_type
    FROM "molecule" "m"
    INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
    INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
    INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
    ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
             "a"."atom_id",
             "c"."atom_id2"
    FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
END

WITH school_data AS (
  SELECT
    s."CDSCode" AS "pk",
    CASE
      WHEN s."Charter" = 1 THEN 'Charter'
      WHEN s."Magnet" = 1 THEN 'Magnet'
      ELSE 'Regular'
    END AS "col2",
    SUBSTR(s."County", 1, INSTR(s."County", ' ') - 1) AS "col3",
    TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(s."LastUpdate", 'YYYY/MM/DD') || ' ' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM, 24), 2, '0') || ':' ||
           LPAD(MOD(ROWNUM * 7, 60), 2, '0'),
           'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') AS "col4"
  FROM "schools" s
  WHERE s."StatusType" = 'Active'
    AND s."LastUpdate" IS NOT NULL
),
filtered_data AS (
  SELECT
    sd."pk",
    sd."col2",
    sd."col3",
    sd."col4"
  FROM school_data sd
  WHERE sd."col4" >= TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:00', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
    AND sd."col4" < TO_DATE('2024/09/04 00:05', 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')
),
aggregated_data AS (
  SELECT
    fd."col2",
    LISTAGG(DISTINCT fd."col3", ', ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY fd."col3") AS "col3_list"
  FROM filtered_data fd
  GROUP BY fd."col2"
)

SELECT
  ad."col2",
  ad."col3_list" AS "col3",
  COUNT(fd."pk") AS "record_count"
FROM aggregated_data ad
LEFT JOIN filtered_data fd ON fd."col2" = ad."col2"
GROUP BY ad."col2", ad."col3_list"
ORDER BY "record_count" DESC

SELECT "molecule"."molecule_id",
       "molecule"."label",
       "atom"."atom_id",
       "atom"."element",
       "bond"."bond_id",
       "bond"."bond_type",
       "connected"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule"
INNER JOIN "atom" ON "molecule"."molecule_id" = "atom"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" ON "atom"."atom_id" = "connected"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" ON "connected"."bond_id" = "bond"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "molecule"."molecule_id",
         "atom"."atom_id",
         "connected"."atom_id2",
         TO_CHAR("bond"."bond_type")

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    m.label,
    a.atom_id,
    a.element,
    b.bond_id,
    b.bond_type
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN connected c ON a.atom_id = c.atom_id
LEFT JOIN bond b ON c.bond_id = b.bond_id
ORDER BY
    m.molecule_id,
    a.atom_id,
    b.bond_id

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(a."atom_id") / COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS result
FROM "molecule" m
INNER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"

WITH atom_counts AS (
    SELECT
        a.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.atom_id) AS atom_count
    FROM atom a
    GROUP BY a.molecule_id
),
bond_counts AS (
    SELECT
        b.molecule_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b.bond_id) AS bond_count
    FROM bond b
    GROUP BY b.molecule_id
)
SELECT
    m.molecule_id AS ID,
    COALESCE(ac.atom_count, 0) AS QTY,
    COALESCE(bc.bond_count, 0) AS VALUE
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN atom_counts ac ON m.molecule_id = ac.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN bond_counts bc ON m.molecule_id = bc.molecule_id

SELECT
    COALESCE(a."atom_id", b."bond_id") AS "id",
    COALESCE(a."molecule_id", b."molecule_id") AS "molecule_id",
    COALESCE(a."element", b."bond_type") AS "val"
FROM "atom" a
FULL OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON a."molecule_id" = b."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "id", "molecule_id"

WITH "data" AS
  (SELECT 101 AS "id",
          'A' AS "type",
          10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    20 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 101 AS "id",
                    'C' AS "type",
                    30 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    10 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 102 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'A' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 103 AS "id",
                    'B' AS "type",
                    25 AS "part"
   FROM dual),
     "w_cnt" AS
  (SELECT "id",
          "part",
          COUNT(*) AS "cnt"
   FROM "data"
   WHERE "type" = 'B'
   GROUP BY "id",
            "part"
   HAVING COUNT(*) > 1)
SELECT d."id",
       d."type",
       d."part"
FROM "data" d
INNER JOIN "w_cnt" w ON d."id" = w."id"
AND d."part" = w."part"
WHERE d."type" = 'B'

SELECT
    m.molecule_id,
    CAST(m.label AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS label,
    a.atom_id,
    CAST(a.element AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS element,
    c.atom_id2,
    b.bond_id,
    CAST(b.bond_type AS NVARCHAR2(512)) AS bond_type
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON CAST(m.molecule_id AS NVARCHAR2(512)) = CAST(a.molecule_id AS NVARCHAR2(512))
LEFT JOIN connected c ON CAST(a.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(512)) = CAST(c.atom_id AS NVARCHAR2(512))
LEFT JOIN bond b ON CAST(c.bond_id AS NVARCHAR2(512)) = CAST(b.bond_id AS NVARCHAR2(512))
ORDER BY m.molecule_id, a.atom_id, c.atom_id2

WITH "columns" ("column_name") AS
  (SELECT 'CDSCode'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'StatusType'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'School'
   FROM dual),
     "column_exists" ("column_name",
                      "column_exists") AS
  (SELECT c."column_name",
          NVL2(a."column_name", 'YES', 'NO')
   FROM "columns" c
   LEFT OUTER JOIN all_tab_columns a ON (a.table_name = 'SCHOOLS'
                                         AND c."column_name" = a."column_name"))
SELECT *
FROM "column_exists" PIVOT (MAX("column_exists")
                            FOR "column_name" IN ('CDSCode' AS "cdscode",
                                                  'StatusType' AS "statustype",
                                                  'School' AS "school"))
WHERE 'CDSCode' IN
    (SELECT "column_name"
     FROM "columns")

WITH replacements ("molecule_id", "label", "spos") AS
  (SELECT "molecule_id",
          "label",
          INSTR("label", '+')
   FROM "molecule"
   UNION ALL
   SELECT "molecule_id",
          SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1),
          INSTR(SUBSTR("label", 1, "spos" - 1) || '-' || SUBSTR("label", "spos" + 1), '+')
   FROM replacements
   WHERE "spos" > 0)
SELECT "molecule_id",
       "label"
FROM replacements
WHERE "spos" = 0

WITH "a" ("test") AS
  (SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details '
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|'
   FROM dual
   UNION ALL SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16'
   FROM dual)
SELECT "test",
       RTRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR("test", '([^|]+(\|)?){1,5}'), '|') AS "res"
FROM "a"

SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type"
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id" AND b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
ORDER BY m."molecule_id", a."atom_id", b."bond_id"

SELECT m1."molecule_id" AS molecule_id1,
       m2."molecule_id" AS molecule_id2
FROM "molecule" m1
INNER JOIN "molecule" m2 ON (m1."molecule_id", m2."molecule_id") IN (
    ('TR427', 'TR430'),
    ('TR427', 'TR431'),
    ('TR430', 'TR431')
)
ORDER BY m1."molecule_id", m2."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."atom_id",
       "a"."element",
       "b"."bond_id",
       "b"."bond_type",
       "c"."atom_id2"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
INNER JOIN "connected" "c" ON "a"."atom_id" = "c"."atom_id"
INNER JOIN "bond" "b" ON "c"."bond_id" = "b"."bond_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id",
         CAST("b"."bond_type" AS NVARCHAR2(512))

WITH string1_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('24,36,78,98', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH('24,36,78,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('24,36,78,98', ',')) + 1
),
string2_tab AS (
    SELECT REGEXP_SUBSTR('25,36,88,98', '[^,]+', 1, LEVEL) AS value
    FROM dual
    CONNECT BY LEVEL <= LENGTH('25,36,88,98') - LENGTH(REPLACE('25,36,88,98', ',')) + 1
),
string1_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string1_tab
    WHERE value IS NOT NULL
),
string2_parsed AS (
    SELECT TO_NUMBER(TRIM(value)) AS num_value
    FROM string2_tab
    WHERE value IS NOT NULL
),
common_values AS (
    SELECT s1.num_value
    FROM string1_parsed s1
    JOIN string2_parsed s2 ON s1.num_value = s2.num_value
)
SELECT LISTAGG(num_value, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY num_value) AS common_values
FROM common_values
WHERE num_value IS NOT NULL

WITH t AS
  (SELECT "date",
          "match_api_id" AS code,
          TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date") AS duration,
          COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id", TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) AS cnt,
          MIN(TRUNC(SYSDATE) - TRUNC("date")) OVER (PARTITION BY TRUNC("date"), "match_api_id") AS min_dur
   FROM "Match")
SELECT t."date",
       t.code,
       t.duration,
       CASE
           WHEN t.min_dur = 0
                OR MAX(t.cnt) OVER (PARTITION BY t."date", t.code) > 1 THEN 'Y'
           ELSE 'N'
       END AS flg
FROM t
WHERE TRUNC(t."date") = TO_DATE('2008-11-22', 'YYYY-MM-DD')

SELECT "m"."molecule_id",
       "m"."label",
       "a"."element"
FROM "molecule" "m"
INNER JOIN "atom" "a" ON "m"."molecule_id" = "a"."molecule_id"
ORDER BY "m"."molecule_id",
         "a"."atom_id"

SELECT b."bond_id",
       b."molecule_id",
       b."bond_type",
       GREATEST(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE - 1, 'MM') + 1, m.months), SYSDATE) AS bond_formation_date
FROM "bond" b
CROSS JOIN
  (SELECT level AS months
   FROM dual CONNECT BY level <= 5) m
WHERE b."molecule_id" = 'TR011'

SELECT JSON_OBJECTAGG(
    KEY country_key
    VALUE match_details
    RETURNING CLOB
) AS JSON_RESULT
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CAST("country_id" AS VARCHAR2(20)) AS country_key,
        JSON_ARRAYAGG(
            JSON_OBJECT(
                KEY 'date' VALUE TO_CHAR("date", 'YYYY-MM-DD'),
                KEY 'home_team_goal' VALUE "home_team_goal",
                KEY 'away_team_goal' VALUE "away_team_goal"
                RETURNING CLOB
            )
            RETURNING CLOB
        ) AS match_details
    FROM "Match"
    WHERE "country_id" IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY "country_id"
)

WITH molecule_stats AS (
    SELECT
        m."molecule_id",
        COUNT(DISTINCT a."atom_id") AS atom_count,
        COUNT(DISTINCT b."bond_id") AS bond_count,
        LISTAGG(DISTINCT a."element", ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY a."element") AS elements
    FROM "molecule" m
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
    LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
    GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
),
molecule_pivot AS (
    SELECT *
    FROM (
        SELECT
            m."molecule_id",
            a."element",
            COUNT(*) AS element_count
        FROM "molecule" m
        JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
        GROUP BY m."molecule_id", a."element"
    )
    PIVOT (
        SUM(element_count)
        FOR element IN ('cl' AS chlorine, 'c' AS carbon, 'h' AS hydrogen, 'o' AS oxygen, 'n' AS nitrogen)
    )
)
SELECT
    m."molecule_id",
    m."label",
    a."atom_id",
    a."element",
    b."bond_id",
    b."bond_type",
    ms.atom_count,
    ms.bond_count,
    ms.elements,
    mp.chlorine,
    mp.carbon,
    mp.hydrogen,
    mp.oxygen,
    mp.nitrogen,
    RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY a."atom_id") AS atom_rank,
    DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m."molecule_id" ORDER BY b."bond_type") AS bond_type_rank,
    CASE
        WHEN a."element" = 'cl' THEN 'Chlorine'
        WHEN a."element" = 'c' THEN 'Carbon'
        WHEN a."element" = 'h' THEN 'Hydrogen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'o' THEN 'Oxygen'
        WHEN a."element" = 'n' THEN 'Nitrogen'
        ELSE a."element"
    END AS element_name
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT OUTER JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "connected" c ON a."atom_id" = c."atom_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_stats ms ON m."molecule_id" = ms."molecule_id"
LEFT OUTER JOIN molecule_pivot mp ON m."molecule_id" = mp."molecule_id"
ORDER BY
    m."molecule_id",
    a."atom_id",
    b."bond_id"

SELECT m."molecule_id",
       COUNT(a."atom_id") AS "total_atoms"
FROM "molecule" m
LEFT JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
GROUP BY m."molecule_id"
ORDER BY m."molecule_id"

SELECT "m"."id",
       "m"."date",
       "m"."home_team_api_id",
       "m"."away_team_api_id",
       "m"."home_team_goal",
       "m"."away_team_goal"
FROM "Match" "m"
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT "team_api_id",
           "buildUpPlaySpeed",
           "date",
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY "team_api_id" ORDER BY "date" DESC) as rn
    FROM "Team_Attributes"
) "ta" ON "m"."home_team_api_id" = "ta"."team_api_id" AND "ta"."rn" = 1
WHERE "ta"."buildUpPlaySpeed" > 
    (SELECT AVG("buildUpPlaySpeed")
     FROM "Team_Attributes")
ORDER BY "m"."home_team_goal" DESC

SELECT 
    "team_api_id",
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2011 THEN "defencePressure" END) AS lose_5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2012 THEN "defencePressure" END) AS lose_10,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2011 THEN "buildUpPlaySpeed" END) AS profit_5,
    SUM(CASE WHEN EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "date") = 2012 THEN "buildUpPlaySpeed" END) AS profit_10
FROM "Team_Attributes"
GROUP BY "team_api_id"
ORDER BY "team_api_id"
